NOTICE OF THE FILING OF A PETITION FOR ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE/PROHIBITION SEEKING TO REVIEW THE ORDERS OF 3/30/94 BY THIS COURT RE DEFT'S MOTION TO QUASH AND DISQUALIFICATION OF JUDGE RONALD QUIDACHAY FOR CAUSE.
